homeSubtitle: A clean, modern presence — focused on quality, clarity, and reliability.
aboutText: Horvath-Systems aims to deliver a professional user experience and clean, scalable code.
contactHint: Place your contact details here (email, GitHub, LinkedIn).
noteText: Minimal structure — no “Services” and no “Projects” sections.
legalNoteText: This is a general template. For real business use, consider refining it to match your actual operations and legal requirements.
privacyText1: This application does not collect, store, or share personal data.
privacyText2: Data provided by the user (e.g. book title, author, ISBN) is stored locally only on the user's device.
privacyText3: The application does not use analytics, tracking, advertising, or third-party data collection services.
privacyText4: No user account or registration is required.
termsText1: The Book Manager application is intended for personal use only.
termsText2: The user is fully responsible for the handling and management of data stored within the application.
termsText3: The developer of the application is not liable for data loss, damages resulting from malfunction, or consequences caused by incorrectly entered data.
termsText4: Modifying, reverse engineering, or unauthorized distribution of the application is not permitted.
termsText5: The application may be updated, modified, or discontinued without prior notice.
